title: Honor Mobile Phones Price in Nepal
summary: Honor: Brand Overview Honor is a consumer electronics brand that sells smartphones, tablets, and wearable technologies. content:
Honor: Brand Overview Honor is a consumer electronics brand that sells smartphones, tablets, and wearable technologies. Previously, it was a part of Huawei Technologies but now it is majority owned by Shenzhen Zhixin New Information Technology (SZNIT)- a state-owned enterprise in China. Honor was founded in 2013 as a subbrand of Huawei to compete in the midrange smartphone market. It sold its first international smartphone - Honor 3C in 2014. But after the Huawei ban went into effect in 2019, they were sold to SZNIT. Since then, the company has thrived in the global market, achieving success with its flagship number series and venturing into the foldable market with the Honor Magic V. Honor in Nepal Honor entered the Nepalese Market in 2018 with Kratos Technologies as its authorized distributor but after the Huawei Ban, things slowed down drastically. But with the spirit to rejuvenate things, Honor appointed Celltron Nepal Pvt Ltd as their official distributor of smartphones. Now Honor Sells its Budget - Midrange X series phones, its Number Series Smartphones, and its Flagship Magic Series smartphones in Nepal. Honor X Series Honor offers its budget to midrange options in the X series. Most Honor X smartphones focus on the need of the general user with an emphasis on battery life and large screens. They have decent-performing chips inside but nothing fancy. As such, you may not find the best performance in an Honor X phone. That being said, they are capable enough to deliver a smooth user experience and run light applications stutter-free. Honor Number Series For anyone looking to stretch their wallet a bit further, Honor offers its Number devices and Number Lite devices too. These have more powerful chipsets, better builds, and more striking designs. One other area they improve upon is the camera department. Higher quality screens, faster refresh rates, better OS support, and extra bells and whistles. Honor Magic Series Finally, Honor also sells flagship devices under the Magic moniker. Currently, The Magic 5 Pro is the sole member of this list that is available for purchase in Nepal. But surely Honor will be adding more to the lineup in the future. These devices have absolutely no compromises in the performance, build, design, or camera department. They are simply the best Honor smartphones money can buy in Nepal. They have the highest-performing SOCs, superfast OLED displays, and flagship-grade camera systems. Honor Service Centers in Nepal As mentioned before, Celltron Nepal works as the official distributor of Honor phones in Nepal. If there are any queries regarding the service or product not working properly, you can contact them at 01-4286616. There is a pickup point where people can get their Honor phones repaired. Some of the contacts associated with Honor service centers are Address at TU Rd, Kathmandu 44600, and Contact at 01-4286616. Honor in Nepal: Conclusion Honor has earned popularity in Nepal as a dependable smartphone brand by focusing on affordability and feature-packed devices. It has emerged as a prominent contender in the Nepali market, catering to consumers' needs with accessible technology. You can conveniently purchase Honor products from popular online platforms like Daraz and Dizikart or visit the Honor Store in Kathmandu or buy from retailers. Frequently Asked Questions Are Honor phones good for daily use? Where can I buy Honor phones in Nepal? Do Honor phones come with a warranty? Are Honor phones good for gaming? How is the battery life of Honor phones?
